payload.answer: SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No query was run and no memory was changed.

entity_resolution.reason: Admin SQL execution was requested, but debug SQL is disabled (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false).

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because debug SQL is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug commands if available.
